title: 第二组小学拓展英语词卡
notes: Core English is generated from the publishable SQLite view.
Remote source images fall back to project-local game art.

cards.hint: Add two apples to the basket.
cards.example: Add two apples to the basket.
cards.exampleZh: 把两个苹果添加到篮子里。

cards.hint: Addition helps us solve number puzzles.
cards.example: Addition helps us solve number puzzles.
cards.exampleZh: 加法帮助我们解决数字谜题。

cards.hint: I drew a bright circle around the smiling sun.
cards.example: I drew a bright circle around the smiling sun.
cards.exampleZh: 我在微笑的太阳周围画了一个明亮的圆形。

cards.hint: I can count to ten.
cards.example: I can count to ten.
cards.exampleZh: 我会数到十。

cards.hint: Counting apples is fun with my friends.
cards.example: Counting apples is fun with my friends.
cards.exampleZh: 和朋友一起数苹果很有趣。

cards.hint: The diamond has four equal sides.
cards.example: The diamond has four equal sides.
cards.exampleZh: 这个菱形有四条相等的边。

cards.hint: We divide eight apples equally among four friends.
cards.example: We divide eight apples equally among four friends.
cards.exampleZh: 我们把八个苹果平均分给四个朋友。

cards.hint: Two plus two is equal to four.
cards.example: Two plus two is equal to four.
cards.exampleZh: 二加二等于四。

cards.hint: Plants grow toward the sunlight.
cards.example: Plants grow toward the sunlight.
cards.exampleZh: 植物向着阳光生长。

cards.hint: We multiply three by two.
cards.example: We multiply three by two.
cards.exampleZh: 我们把三乘以二。

cards.hint: I know the number of apples in the basket.
cards.example: I know the number of apples in the basket.
cards.exampleZh: 我知道篮子里苹果的数量。

cards.hint: This rectangle has four straight sides.
cards.example: This rectangle has four straight sides.
cards.exampleZh: 这个长方形有四条直边。

cards.hint: A strong root helps the young plant grow.
cards.example: A strong root helps the young plant grow.
cards.exampleZh: 强壮的根帮助幼小的植物生长。

cards.hint: A tiny seed can grow into a beautiful flower.
cards.example: A tiny seed can grow into a beautiful flower.
cards.exampleZh: 一粒小小的种子可以长成一朵美丽的花。

cards.hint: The shallow pond is safe for little ducks.
cards.example: The shallow pond is safe for little ducks.
cards.exampleZh: 这个浅水池对小鸭子来说很安全。

cards.hint: My short story made everyone smile.
cards.example: My short story made everyone smile.
cards.exampleZh: 我的短故事让大家都笑了。

cards.hint: I sleep peacefully every night.
cards.example: I sleep peacefully every night.
cards.exampleZh: 我每天晚上都安静地睡觉。

cards.hint: The slow turtle reached the pond safely.
cards.example: The slow turtle reached the pond safely.
cards.exampleZh: 那只慢慢的乌龟安全地到达了池塘。

cards.hint: The small puppy loves to play.
cards.example: The small puppy loves to play.
cards.exampleZh: 这只小狗喜欢玩耍。

cards.hint: Plants grow well in rich soil.
cards.example: Plants grow well in rich soil.
cards.exampleZh: 植物在肥沃的土壤中生长得很好。

cards.hint: I speak kindly to my friends.
cards.example: I speak kindly to my friends.
cards.exampleZh: 我友善地和朋友们说话。

cards.hint: Draw a square with four equal sides.
cards.example: Draw a square with four equal sides.
cards.exampleZh: 画一个四条边相等的正方形。

cards.hint: Please stand tall and smile.
cards.example: Please stand tall and smile.
cards.exampleZh: 请站直并微笑。

cards.hint: The flower has a strong green stem.
cards.example: The flower has a strong green stem.
cards.exampleZh: 这朵花有一根结实的绿色茎。

cards.hint: My strong arms can lift toys.
cards.example: My strong arms can lift toys.
cards.exampleZh: 我强壮的手臂能举起玩具。

cards.hint: We subtract two apples from ten.
cards.example: We subtract two apples from ten.
cards.exampleZh: 我们从十个苹果中减去两个苹果。

cards.hint: Subtraction helps us solve math problems.
cards.example: Subtraction helps us solve math problems.
cards.exampleZh: 减法帮助我们解决数学问题。

cards.hint: Sunlight helps plants grow strong.
cards.example: Sunlight helps plants grow strong.
cards.exampleZh: 阳光帮助植物茁壮成长。

cards.hint: The tall giraffe gently waves.
cards.example: The tall giraffe gently waves.
cards.exampleZh: 那只高高的长颈鹿轻轻地挥手。

cards.hint: The temperature feels warm and comfortable today.
cards.example: The temperature feels warm and comfortable today.
cards.exampleZh: 今天的温度感觉温暖而舒适。

cards.hint: The thick book feels cozy.
cards.example: The thick book feels cozy.
cards.exampleZh: 这本厚厚的书摸起来很舒服。

cards.hint: The thin book fits easily in my backpack.
cards.example: The thin book fits easily in my backpack.
cards.exampleZh: 这本薄薄的书很容易放进我的书包里。

cards.hint: Please touch the soft puppy gently.
cards.example: Please touch the soft puppy gently.
cards.exampleZh: 请轻轻地摸摸这只柔软的小狗。

cards.hint: This triangle has three sides.
cards.example: This triangle has three sides.
cards.exampleZh: 这个三角形有三条边。

cards.hint: We walk to school with happy smiles.
cards.example: We walk to school with happy smiles.
cards.exampleZh: 我们开心地笑着走路去学校。

cards.hint: The warm blanket feels cozy.
cards.example: The warm blanket feels cozy.
cards.exampleZh: 温暖的毯子让人感觉很舒适。

cards.hint: Watch the bright birds fly.
cards.example: Watch the bright birds fly.
cards.exampleZh: 看明亮的鸟儿飞翔。

cards.hint: I felt weak, so Mom helped me.
cards.example: I felt weak, so Mom helped me.
cards.exampleZh: 我感到虚弱，所以妈妈帮助了我。

cards.hint: The weather is sunny today.
cards.example: The weather is sunny today.
cards.exampleZh: 今天天气晴朗。

cards.hint: My wet hands made the soap bubbles sparkle.
cards.example: My wet hands made the soap bubbles sparkle.
cards.exampleZh: 我湿漉漉的手让肥皂泡闪闪发光。

cards.hint: The wide road feels safe.
cards.example: The wide road feels safe.
cards.exampleZh: 这条宽阔的路让人觉得安全。

cards.hint: Our adventure began with a happy song.
cards.example: Our adventure began with a happy song.
cards.exampleZh: 我们的冒险伴随着一首快乐的歌开始了。

cards.hint: Civilization helps people build cities, share ideas, and create art.
cards.example: Civilization helps people build cities, share ideas, and create art.
cards.exampleZh: 文明帮助人们建造城市、分享思想并创造艺术。

cards.hint: My computer helps me learn.
cards.example: My computer helps me learn.
cards.exampleZh: 我的电脑帮助我学习。

cards.hint: Asia is the largest continent on Earth.
cards.example: Asia is the largest continent on Earth.
cards.exampleZh: 亚洲是地球上最大的大洲。

cards.hint: Creativity helps us find fun ways to solve problems.
cards.example: Creativity helps us find fun ways to solve problems.
cards.exampleZh: 创造力帮助我们找到有趣的方法解决问题。

cards.hint: Curiosity helps us discover wonderful things every day.
cards.example: Curiosity helps us discover wonderful things every day.
cards.exampleZh: 好奇心帮助我们每天发现奇妙的事物。

cards.hint: Every discovery makes learning more exciting.
cards.example: Every discovery makes learning more exciting.
cards.exampleZh: 每一个发现都让学习变得更加有趣。

cards.hint: Division helps us share eight apples equally.
cards.example: Division helps us share eight apples equally.
cards.exampleZh: 除法帮助我们把八个苹果平均分配。

cards.hint: A pond ecosystem helps frogs, fish, and plants thrive.
cards.example: A pond ecosystem helps frogs, fish, and plants thrive.
cards.exampleZh: 池塘生态系帮助青蛙、鱼和植物茁壮成长。

cards.hint: We calmly call for help during an emergency.
cards.example: We calmly call for help during an emergency.
cards.exampleZh: 遇到紧急情况时，我们冷静地寻求帮助。

cards.hint: A fraction shows how much of a whole we have.
cards.example: A fraction shows how much of a whole we have.
cards.exampleZh: 分数表示我们拥有整体的多少。

cards.hint: Geometry helps us understand shapes.
cards.example: Geometry helps us understand shapes.
cards.exampleZh: 几何帮助我们理解形状。

cards.hint: Gravity keeps us safely on Earth.
cards.example: Gravity keeps us safely on Earth.
cards.exampleZh: 重力让我们安全地留在地球上。

cards.hint: Our family heritage makes every celebration special.
cards.example: Our family heritage makes every celebration special.
cards.exampleZh: 我们的家庭遗产让每次庆祝都很特别。

cards.hint: My imagination helps me create wonderful stories.
cards.example: My imagination helps me create wonderful stories.
cards.exampleZh: 我的想象力帮助我创作精彩的故事。

cards.hint: Independence helps us learn, grow, and make good choices.
cards.example: Independence helps us learn, grow, and make good choices.
cards.exampleZh: 独立帮助我们学习、成长并做出正确的选择。

cards.hint: I enjoy reading children's literature before bedtime.
cards.example: I enjoy reading children's literature before bedtime.
cards.exampleZh: 我喜欢睡前阅读儿童文学。

cards.hint: A molecule is a tiny building block of everything around us.
cards.example: A molecule is a tiny building block of everything around us.
cards.exampleZh: 分子是我们周围一切事物的微小组成部分。

cards.hint: Multiplication makes solving number puzzles fun.
cards.example: Multiplication makes solving number puzzles fun.
cards.exampleZh: 乘法让解决数字谜题变得有趣。

cards.hint: Perseverance helps us keep trying when learning feels difficult.
cards.example: Perseverance helps us keep trying when learning feels difficult.
cards.exampleZh: 坚持不懈帮助我们在学习困难时继续努力。

cards.hint: Plants use photosynthesis to make food from sunlight.
cards.example: Plants use photosynthesis to make food from sunlight.
cards.exampleZh: 植物利用光合作用从阳光中制造食物。

cards.hint: She loves reading poetry aloud.
cards.example: She loves reading poetry aloud.
cards.exampleZh: 她喜欢大声朗读诗歌。

cards.hint: In the game, friendly heroes respawn after a fun challenge.
cards.example: In the game, friendly heroes respawn after a fun challenge.
cards.exampleZh: 在游戏中，友好的英雄在有趣的挑战后重生。

cards.hint: Taking care of my puppy is a big responsibility.
cards.example: Taking care of my puppy is a big responsibility.
cards.exampleZh: 照顾我的小狗是一项重大责任。

cards.hint: Science helps us understand our wonderful world.
cards.example: Science helps us understand our wonderful world.
cards.exampleZh: 科学帮助我们了解奇妙的世界。

cards.hint: The smooth stone feels nice.
cards.example: The smooth stone feels nice.
cards.exampleZh: 这块光滑的石头摸起来很舒服。

cards.hint: The ice is solid.
cards.example: The ice is solid.
cards.exampleZh: 冰是固体。

cards.hint: We can teleport to the moon in our dreams.
cards.example: We can teleport to the moon in our dreams.
cards.exampleZh: 我们可以在梦里传送到月球。

cards.hint: The transparent glass lets us see the colorful fish.
cards.example: The transparent glass lets us see the colorful fish.
cards.exampleZh: 透明的玻璃让我们看见了五彩缤纷的鱼。
